subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-Káẓim! Verily, My Most Exalted Pen desireth to make mention of thee. Blessed art thou, inasmuch as thou hast attained unto My days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل کاظم ان قلمی الاعلی یحب ان یذکرک طوبی لک بما فزت بایامی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
